visits.note: Initial evaluation for new patient with hypertension and hyperlipidemia. Patient reports fatigue and shortness of breath. BP 140/90, HbA1c 7.2, eGFR 72, LDL 130. Patient started on lisinopril 10mg and simvastatin 20mg.

Follow-up visit to assess lab trends. Patient reports worsening fatigue and recent onset of leg swelling. BP 145/95, HbA1c 8.1, eGFR 65, LDL 145. Due to elevated HbA1c, patient's simvastatin dose increased to 40mg. Lisinopril increased to 20mg.

Follow-up visit to reassess lab trends and manage chronic kidney disease. Patient reports continued fatigue, shortness of breath, and leg swelling. BP 150/100, HbA1c 9.0, eGFR 55, LDL 160. Due to declining eGFR, patient started on erythropoietin for anemia management. Lisinopril and simvastatin doses remain the same.
